scripts.check:stability: pnpm run check:client-boundaries && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run test:stability
scripts.check:metadata-ui-smoke: pnpm run check:metadata-ui-imports && tsx scripts/check-metadata-ui-smoke.mts && vitest run tests/dashboard-view.test.tsx tests/dashboard-entity-shortcuts.test.tsx tests/audit-view.test.tsx tests/documents-view.test.tsx tests/document-detail-view.test.tsx tests/document-upload-form.test.tsx tests/hr-hub-view.test.tsx tests/assistant-view.test.tsx
